_comment: SYNTHETIC test fixture for the Skill 60 EWS sentinel test suite. No client data. context-window-clean: identical to baseline-clean.json PLUS the _contextWindow hint (128000) baseline-clean.json itself omits. softThresholdTokens stays sane (20000), so the effective ceiling (contextWindow - softThresholdTokens) is 108000 - a healthy, non-broken box. This is the config half of the D-CONTEXT-USAGE drill: paired with context-usage-86pct.trajectory.jsonl, it exercises _context_usage() computing a real usage_pct from live trajectory data (previously nothing did this - the 70%/85% branches of sig_s3 were dead code) and the two-lane delivery that usage_pct feeds. See tests/drills/D-CONTEXT-USAGE.md.
